Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class WorkforceEngagementSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.WorkforceEngagementSettings
public class WorkforceEngagementSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for WorkforceEngagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WorkforceEngagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableHistoricalAdherence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIndividualAdherence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIntradayManagement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableMachineLearningForecasting" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableRealTimeAdherence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWorkforceEngagement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWorkforceEngagementConfiguration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
